_readme: Timeline entries, rendered in array order (keep newest first). To add an internship/role: copy an object, fill fields, set visible:true.

timeline.description: Promoted from Jr. Public Relations Officer. Leads outreach and promotion for VESIT's Computer Society of India chapter.

Designed and hosted a live, end-to-end Blender 3D workshop for 60+ absolute beginners — reverse-engineered his own learning struggles into a curriculum that took the room from blank canvas to finished renders.
Conceptualized and produced a Stranger Things–themed promotional reel that went viral within the student community and measurably drove event registrations.
